nodes.label: Fast Construction of the Radio Map Based on Improved Low-Rank Matrix Completion (Wang et al., Journal of Sensors 2021)
nodes.source_file: raw/Wang et al. - 2021 - Fast Construction of the Radio Map Based on the Im.pdf | My Library | Zotero.pdf
nodes.source_location: Journal of Sensors, Volume 2021, Article ID 2017208
nodes.author: Zhuang Wang, Liye Zhang, Qun Kong, Kangtao Wang

nodes.label: Frobenius Parameter for Stabilized Low-Rank Matrix Completion in Radio Maps
nodes.source_file: raw/Wang et al. - 2021 - Fast Construction of the Radio Map Based on the Im.pdf | My Library | Zotero.pdf
nodes.rationale: Adding a Frobenius norm parameter to the traditional low-rank model controls solution instability during sparse-to-dense radio map filling; a separate recovery step eliminates environmental noise.

nodes.label: Low-Rank Matrix Completion for Radio Map Construction
nodes.source_file: raw/Wang et al. - 2021 - Fast Construction of the Radio Map Based on the Im.pdf | My Library | Zotero.pdf
nodes.rationale: RSS data exhibits spatial correlation and low-rank structure; exploiting this via matrix completion fills a sparse set of measured reference points into a complete radio map, reducing manual data collection cost.
